codes.SESSION_EXPIRED_NO_REFRESH: Your session has expired or secure refresh data is missing. Please sign in again.
codes.NOT_AUTHENTICATED: You are not signed in, or the session is no longer valid. Please sign in to continue.
codes.REFRESH_REJECTED: The server could not refresh your session. Please sign in again.
codes.REFRESH_FAILED: We could not refresh your session. Please try again or sign in again.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
codes.HTTP_ERROR: The request could not be completed. Please try again later.
